zh.Otterden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特奧特爾登
zh.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: 英國肯特武爾可姆哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane de Luxembourg於1382年出生在英國英格蘭肯特武爾可姆時，她的父親Gille de Luxembourg27歲，母親Clemence Luxembourg22歲。她於大約1388年與Ralph De St. Leger在美國康乃狄克州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1416年在英國英格蘭肯特奧特爾登享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane de Luxembourg于1382年出生在英国英格兰肯特武爾可姆时，她的父亲Gille de Luxembourg27岁，母亲Clemence Luxembourg22岁。她于大约1388年与Ralph De St. Leger在美国康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1416年在英国英格兰肯特奧特爾登享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane de Luxembourg was born in 1382, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gille de Luxembourg, was 27 and her mother, Clemence Luxembourg, was 22. She married Ralph De St. Leger about 1388, in Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1416, in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane de Luxembourg est née en 1382, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gille de Luxembourg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Clemence Luxembourg, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph De St. Leger environ 1388, à Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1416, à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane de Luxembourg 1382 in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gille de Luxembourg 27 und ihre Mutter Clemence Luxembourg 22. Sie hat um 1388 in Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Ralph De St. Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1416 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Luxembourg è nata il nel 1382 nel Ulcombe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gille de Luxembourg, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Clemence Luxembourg, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Ralph De St. Leger circa 1388, nel Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1416, nel Otterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Luxembourgが1382年にイギリスイギリスケントウルコンベで生まれた時，父Gille de Luxembourgは27歳，母Clemence Luxembourgは22歳であった。約1388年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州でRalph De St. Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1416年にイギリスイギリスケントオッテルデンで34歳で死去した。

ko.Luxembourg City, Lëtzebuerg, Luxembourg,: 룩셈부르크 루세보우르그 루세보우르그 시티 루세보우르그 시티
ko.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: 영국 켄트 울코브 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Luxembourg(이)가 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 울코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gille de Luxembourg(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence Luxembourg(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1388년 미국 코네티컷 주에서 Ralph De St. Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 오터든에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Luxembourg nasceu em 1382, em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gille de Luxembourg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Clemence Luxembourg, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph De St. Leger aproximadamente 1388, em Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1416, em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.All Saints' Church, Ulcombe, Kent, Engla: алл сеинц' чурч, улкомб, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane de Luxembourg родилась в 1382 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gille de Luxembourg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence Luxembourg, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph De St. Leger около 1388 г. в местности Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1416 г. в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane de Luxembourg nació en 1382, en Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gille de Luxembourg, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Clemence Luxembourg, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ralph De St. Leger aproximadamente 1388, en Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1416, en Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
